dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates strong adherence to architectural rules, evidenced by successful schema validations across multiple synthesis steps (synthesis-narrative, synthesis-rules). The agent consistently aligned with the defined semantic contracts and prompt schemas.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration flow successfully progressed through context synthesis, narrative synthesis, and rule synthesis. The sequential structure suggests a logical cause-effect mapping in how architectural components were contextualized and refined, though deeper causal links would require content inspection.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The multi-step synthesis approach (context -> narrative -> rules) indicates an attempt to surface and resolve architectural trade-offs by iteratively refining the design space. The flow structure supports tension identification through progressive constraint application.
